tags.name: `mc-month-year-picker`
tags.description:
Purpose: Select month and year from two separate pickers
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to select a month and year without a specific day
When not to use: When you need to select a specific date
Works with components: mc-input-date, mc-date-range
Alternative component names: Month Year Selector, Month Year Dropdown

Events:

  * `monthyearselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when the year and month are selected.

Attributes:

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the month-year-picker.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render.

  * `value` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Month and year of the picker. Month is accepted as string and zero indexed number.

  * `preventinitialeventdispatch` {`boolean`} - True if the monthyearselected event shouldn't be
dispatched on initial load when used in a popover.

  * `min` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Define minimal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `max` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Define maximal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `locale` {`string`} - Locale to render the month/day names in.
By default the component will use the users browser language.
Defaults to `en-GB` if fetching browser languge fails.

Properties:

  * `monthPicker` - 

  * `yearPicker` - 

  * `monthsData` {`{ label: string; value: string; disabled?: boolean | undefined; }[]`} - 

  * `yearsData` {`{ label: string; value: number; disabled?: boolean | undefined; }[]`} - 

  * `months` {`Map<number, Month>`} - 

  * `years` {`Year[]`} - 

  * `month` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `year` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the month-year-picker.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render.

  * `value` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Month and year of the picker. Month is accepted as string and zero indexed number.

  * `preventinitialeventdispatch` {`boolean`} - True if the monthyearselected event shouldn't be
dispatched on initial load when used in a popover.

  * `min` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Define minimal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `max` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Define maximal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `locale` {`string`} - Locale to render the month/day names in.
By default the component will use the users browser language.
Defaults to `en-GB` if fetching browser languge fails.

  * `monthyearselected` - Emitted when a new month or year is selected

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the month-year-picker.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: yearcap
attributes.description:
`yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render.

Property: yearcap

Default: 10

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
`value` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Month and year of the picker. Month is accepted as string and zero indexed number.

Property: value

Default: [object Object]

attributes.name: preventinitialeventdispatch
attributes.description:
`preventinitialeventdispatch` {`boolean`} - True if the monthyearselected event shouldn't be
dispatched on initial load when used in a popover.

Property: preventinitialeventdispatch

Default: false

attributes.name: min
attributes.description:
`min` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Define minimal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

Property: min

Default: [object Object]

attributes.name: max
attributes.description:
`max` {`MonthYearPickerValue | undefined`} - Define maximal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

Property: max

Default: [object Object]

attributes.name: locale
attributes.description:
`locale` {`string`} - Locale to render the month/day names in.
By default the component will use the users browser language.
Defaults to `en-GB` if fetching browser languge fails.

Property: locale

Default: en-GB

attributes.name: onmonthyearselected
attributes.description: `monthyearselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when the year and month are selected.
